scripts.build: npm --workspace apps/api run build && npm --workspace apps/web run build
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e && npm run build && npm run test:ocr
scripts.test:ocr: npm --workspace apps/api run build && node scripts/evaluate-business-card-ocr.js --engine=paddle
scripts.test:ocr:tesseract: npm --workspace apps/api run build && node scripts/evaluate-business-card-ocr.js --engine=tesseract
scripts.test:ocr:parse: npm --workspace apps/api run build && node scripts/evaluate-business-card-ocr.js --use-report-ocr
scripts.test:ocr:fresh: npm --workspace apps/api run build && node scripts/evaluate-business-card-ocr.js --no-cache
scripts.test:ocr:paddle: npm --workspace apps/api run build && node scripts/evaluate-business-card-ocr.js --engine=paddle
scripts.test:ocr:paddle:sample: npm --workspace apps/api run build && node scripts/evaluate-business-card-ocr.js --engine=paddle --limit=5 --paddle-batch-size=5
scripts.test:ocr:paddle:fresh: npm --workspace apps/api run build && node scripts/evaluate-business-card-ocr.js --engine=paddle --no-cache
scripts.test:ocr:paddle:strict: npm --workspace apps/api run build && node scripts/evaluate-business-card-ocr.js --engine=paddle --strict --min=0.70
scripts.test:ocr:opencv: python scripts/preprocess-business-cards-opencv.py && npm --workspace apps/api run build && node scripts/evaluate-business-card-ocr.js --image-dir=datasets/business-cards/opencv-scans --no-cache
scripts.test:ocr:strict: npm --workspace apps/api run build && node scripts/evaluate-business-card-ocr.js --engine=paddle --strict --min=0.70
scripts.lint: npm --workspace apps/api run lint && npm --workspace apps/web run lint
